name: Future Vision II Acquisition Corporation Ordinary shares
summary: Future Vision II Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs do not have specific business operations and are formed to raise capital through an initial public offering (IPO) for the purpose of acquiring an existing company. The company is likely based where it was incorporated, often Delaware.
